query:
UPDATE users SET role_family = 'hr_leadership' WHERE tenant_id = (SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE slug = 'acme') AND first_name = 'Sarah' AND last_name = 'Thornton' AND role_family = 'talent';
UPDATE users SET role_family = 'hr_leadership', job_function = 'HR Director' WHERE tenant_id = (SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE slug = 'acme') AND first_name = 'Roger' AND last_name = 'Hunt' AND (role_family IS NULL OR role_family = '');
